assertions.title: Deletion with children - reparenting to roots

steps.expected: Parent tension created with ULID id

steps.action: Create child tensions with parent_id referencing parent
steps.observed: Two children created with correct parent_id

steps.expected: Parent status changes to Resolved, children reparented to null
steps.observed: Parent resolved, children now have parent_id=None and appear in get_roots()

steps.action: Verify parent_id mutations recorded for children
steps.expected: Each child has a parent_id mutation recording the reparenting
steps.observed: Children have parent_id mutations with old_value=parent.id and new_value='' (empty/null)

steps.expected: Same behavior as resolve - children become roots
steps.observed: Children successfully reparented to null when parent released

steps.action: Create tensions and updates across time window
steps.expected: Multiple mutations created at different timestamps
steps.observed: Created 4 mutations with small time delays between them

steps.action: Query mutations_between(start, end) with inclusive range
steps.expected: Returns only mutations within time window, ordered chronologically
steps.observed: Correctly returned 2 mutations within specified range
Returned single mutation at exact timestamp

steps.action: Verify chronological ordering across multiple tensions
steps.expected: All mutations ordered by timestamp ascending regardless of tension_id
steps.observed: 4 mutations correctly ordered chronologically across 2 tensions

assertions.title: History enables state reconstruction - mutation replay

steps.action: Create tension and perform series of updates
steps.expected: Tension created, then updated via store operations
steps.observed: Created tension with 'initial goal/reality', updated desired, actual, parent_id multiple times
6 mutations returned: created, desired×2, actual×2, parent_id×1
ReconstructedTension with correct final desired, actual, parent_id, status

steps.action: Compare reconstructed with direct store query
steps.expected: Values match exactly (id, desired, actual, parent_id, status)
steps.observed: All fields match - replay successfully reproduces current state

steps.action: Verify error handling for empty mutations
Verify error handling for missing creation mutation

summary: All 3 rerun assertions now PASS. VAL-TENSION-012 (deletion with children) was previously fail - now implemented with atomic reparenting to roots. VAL-MUTATION-007 (time range query) was previously blocked - now implemented as mutations_between(). VAL-MUTATION-011 (mutation replay) was previously blocked - now implemented as replay_mutations().
